provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human woman in her 30s with a shaved head and a crude faction brand burned into her forearm showing allegiance to a specific Reach crew, wearing mismatched salvaged armor pieces strapped over a torn charcoal thermal undersuit — one shoulder plate clearly cut from ship hull plating and welded to a leather strap showing arc-weld marks, a Compact-issue sidearm with the serial number filed off in a handmade kydex holster that still smells of the chemical set, boots from two different pairs one black Compact regulation one brown civilian both worn at the heels, a rust and ash color palette that is partly choice and partly the color everything turns after enough time in the Reach, a small knife in a boot sheath that she has used more than the pistol
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
